sourceSections.title: Summary
sourceSections.text: Small 2D prototype where the player collects a key and reaches an exit while avoiding a timed hazard.

sourceSections.title: Controls
sourceSections.text: Player moves left and right with arrow keys or A/D, and jumps with Space.

sourceSections.title: Evidence
sourceSections.text: A trusted scenario must verify collect-key-then-exit and write local evidence before review-gated apply.

sourceSections.title: Non-goals
sourceSections.text: No native export, no commercial release, and avoid uncontrolled asset creation.
